description: Style NoteThese sandals from catwalk are perfect for party wear. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress.Product DetailsShiney silver sandal with transparent plastic strap on the forefoot and a plastic strap on the midfoot with crystal embellishmentsSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with textured rubber outsole on the forefoot and a heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 4"
